items.title: The largest contracts in the NBA for this upcoming season in terms of percentage of the total cap they take up.
items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt:
The largest contracts in the NBA for this upcoming season in terms of percentage of the total cap they take up. 

You can find this information here www.spotrac.com/nba/rankings... and search by team or position and even look at future seasons.

images.alt:
Table titled “The NBA’s Biggest Cap Hits: Top 10 players by percentage of the salary cap, 2026-27 season.” Ranked list with team logos:

	1.	Stephen Curry, Golden State Warriors — 37.94%
	2.	Nikola Jokic, Denver Nuggets — 35.79%
	3.	Giannis Antetokounmpo, Miami Heat — 35.44%
	4.	Anthony Davis, Washington Wizards — 35.44%
	5.	Jayson Tatum, Boston Celtics — 35.44%
	6.	Joel Embiid, Philadelphia 76ers — 35.15%
	7.	Jaylen Brown, Philadelphia 76ers — 35.00%
	8.	Devin Booker, Phoenix Suns — 34.60%
	9.	Karl-Anthony Towns, New York Knicks — 34.60%
	10.	Jimmy Butler, Golden State Warriors — 34.45%

* the far different road ahead for the franchise.
